mermaidSyntax:
graph LR subgraph Screening["Screening Period
Weeks -4 to 0"] A[Informed Consent
Week -4] --> B[Eligibility
Assessment] B --> C[Baseline
Measurements
Week 0] end subgraph Treatment["Treatment Period
Weeks 0-52"] C --> D{Randomization
Week 0} D -->|Treatment Arm| E[Drug X 10mg Daily
Weeks 0-52] D -->|Control Arm| F[Placebo Daily
Weeks 0-52] E --> G1[Follow-up
Week 4] F --> G2[Follow-up
Week 4] G1 --> H1[Follow-up
Week 12] G2 --> H2[Follow-up
Week 12] H1 --> I1[Follow-up
Week 26] H2 --> I2[Follow-up
Week 26] I1 --> J1[Primary Endpoint
Week 52] I2 --> J2[Primary Endpoint
Week 52] end subgraph Extension["Extension Period
Weeks 52-104"] J1 --> K[Safety Follow-up
Week 56] J2 --> K K --> L[Open-Label Extension
Weeks 52-104
(Optional)] end style D fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style E fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff style F fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff style L fill:#6b7280,stroke:#4b5563,color:#fff,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
